hoses: Supply line from hydrant to Engine 181 intake
FDC Supply Line A from Engine 181 discharge to sprinkler FDC inlet A
FDC Supply Line B from Engine 181 discharge to sprinkler FDC inlet B
sceneElements.elevation: Grade-level FDC connection. Third-floor sprinkler area used in one problem.

problems.title: Sprinkler FDC Pump Pressure With Supply Hose
problems.question: Engine 181 is supplying a sprinkler-only FDC support operation. Use a 150 PSI base sprinkler support setting. The FDC is supplied through 200 ft of 2.5-inch hose carrying 250 GPM. Use C = 2, no elevation, and no appliance loss. What pump discharge pressure should be set?
formulaBreakdown: Pump pressure = base sprinkler setting 150 + supply hose FL 25 = 175 PSI.
problems.instructorExplanation: When a sprinkler FDC support line has a meaningful supply stretch, add that hose friction loss to the base sprinkler support pressure.
problems.explainMistake: Do not ignore the supply hose between the engine and FDC when the problem gives a length and flow.

problems.title: Flow Per Sprinkler FDC Inlet
problems.question: The sprinkler FDC support operation is supplied by two equal FDC inlets. If the target support flow is 500 GPM total, how much flow is carried by each FDC inlet?
formulaBreakdown: Flow per inlet = total sprinkler support flow ÷ number of equal FDC inlets.
problems.instructorExplanation: When two equal FDC inlets are supplied, the total target flow is split evenly between them.
problems.explainMistake: Do not count the two FDC hoses as two separate 500 GPM flows. The total flow is split between the equal inlets.

problems.title: Third-Floor Sprinkler Support Pressure
problems.question: The sprinkler-only FDC support base setting is 150 PSI. If the supplied sprinkler area is on the 3rd floor, use 1st floor = 0 ft and 3rd floor = 20 ft, adding 0.5 PSI per foot. What pump discharge pressure should be set?
formulaBreakdown: Floor rule: 1st floor = 0 ft, 3rd floor = 20 ft.
Pump pressure = base sprinkler support pressure + elevation.
problems.instructorExplanation: The base FirePumpSim sprinkler support pressure is 150 PSI. Because the sprinkler area is on the third floor, add 10 PSI for elevation, giving a pump discharge pressure of 160 PSI.
problems.explainMistake: Do not leave the pressure at 150 PSI when the supplied sprinkler area is known to be above grade. Add the elevation pressure for the third floor.
